inputs.label: Guest Count
inputs.businessContext: The number of guests expected at the buffet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of guests expected at the buffet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der erwarteten Gäste am Buffet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre d'invités attendus au buffet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de invitados esperados en el buffet.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الضيوف المتوقع حضورهم في البوفيه.

inputs.label: Ticket Price
inputs.businessContext: The price each guest pays for the buffet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price each guest pays for the buffet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her misafirin büfe için ödediği fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, den jeder Gast für das Buffet zahlt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix que chaque invité paie pour le buffet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio que paga cada invitado por el buffet.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الذي يدفعه كل ضيف مقابل البوفيه.

inputs.label: Food Cost
inputs.businessContext: The average cost of food ingredients per guest.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average cost of food ingredients per guest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Misafir başına ortalama yiyecek malzemesi maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die durchschnittlichen Kosten für Lebensmittelzutaten pro Gast.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coût moyen des ingrédients alimentaires par invité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de ingredientes por invitado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط تكلفة مكونات الطعام لكل ضيف.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost for the event, including preparation and service.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total labor cost for the event, including preparation and service.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hazırlık ve servis dahil etkinlik için toplam işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Arbeitskosten für die Veranstaltung, einschließlich Vorbereitung und Service.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total de main-d'œuvre pour l'événement, incluant la préparation et le service.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de mano de obra para el evento, incluyendo preparación y servicio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي تكلفة العمالة للحدث، بما في ذلك التحضير والخدمة.

inputs.label: Overhead Cost
inputs.businessContext: Fixed overhead costs such as rent, utilities, equipment rental.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed overhead costs such as rent, utilities, equipment rental.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira, elektrik, ekipman kiralama gibi sabit genel giderler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixe Gemeinkosten wie Miete, Nebenkosten, Gerätemiete.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais généraux fixes tels que loyer, services publics, location d'équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos generales fijos como alquiler, servicios públicos, alquiler de equipos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكاليف العامة الثابتة مثل الإيجار والمرافق واستئجار المعدات.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food cost expected to be wasted (spoilage, leftovers).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of food cost expected to be wasted (spoilage, leftovers).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyecek maliyetinin israf edilmesi beklenen yüzdesi (bozulma, artıklar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Lebensmittelkosten, der voraussichtlich verschwendet wird (Verderb, Reste).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du coût alimentaire estimé perdu (gaspillage, restes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del costo de alimentos que se espera desperdiciar (descomposición, sobras).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة تكلفة الطعام المتوقع هدرها (تلف، بقايا).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
